title: Full list of startup ideas that Y Combinator wants to invest in in 2026

Full list of startup ideas that Y Combinator wants to invest in in 2026:
Y Combinator released their Fall Request for Startups list, which highlights the industries and ideas that they are looking to fund and back founders in.
1. Retraining workers for the AI economy.
2. Video generation as a primitive
3. The first 10-person, $100 billion company.
4. Infrastructure for multi-agent systems.
5. AI-native enterprise software.
6. Using LLMs instead of government consulting.
If you're building a startup at the intersection of these sectors, there is a high chance Y Combinator will notice you
